name: ICNF Geocatálogo - Nature Conservation and Forestry SDI
operator: Instituto da Conservação da Natureza e das Florestas (ICNF)
dataType: Protected areas, Natura 2000, forest inventory, wildfire history, LiDAR, wildlife occurrence
description: Portugal's nature conservation and forestry SDI providing INSPIRE-compliant access to protected areas, forest regime lands, Natura 2000 network, wildfire perimeters, LiDAR data and wildlife occurrence records across the national territory.

name: Instituto Hidrográfico - Marine and Hydrographic Data
operator: Instituto Hidrográfico (IH), Portuguese Navy
dataType: Bathymetry, nautical charts, tidal predictions, ocean temperature, wave climate, seabed geology
spatialResolution: varies (10 m nearshore to 100 m offshore)
description: Portuguese Hydrographic Institute providing bathymetric grids via the GRIDMAR portal under the SEAMAP 2030 programme, plus nautical charts, tidal predictions, and ocean environmental monitoring data.

name: Geoportal do Mar Português - DGRM Maritime Spatial Data
operator: Direção-Geral de Recursos Naturais, Segurança e Serviços Marítimos (DGRM)
dataType: Maritime spatial planning, aquaculture zones, fishing areas, marine easements, oceanographic characterisation
description: Integrated marine geoportal aggregating geographic layers from IH, APA, IPMA, ICNF and other agencies on maritime spatial planning, current use of national maritime space, easements and aquaculture zones.

name: EMEPC - Continental Shelf Data and Samples
operator: Estrutura de Missão para a Extensão da Plataforma Continental (EMEPC)
dataType: Bathymetry, seabed geology, geophysics, geochemistry, marine biology samples
description: Data and samples collected during Portuguese oceanographic campaigns for the continental shelf extension submission, covering bathymetry, marine geology, geophysics and biology of Portugal's extended continental shelf.

name: IFAP iSIP - Land Parcel Identification System
operator: Instituto de Financiamento da Agricultura e Pescas (IFAP)
dataType: Agricultural parcel boundaries, land use/cover declarations, orthoimagery, CAP eligibility zones
description: Portugal's Land Parcel Identification System (iSIP) managed by IFAP providing annually updated agricultural parcel boundaries, declared crop types, orthoimagery and CAP eligibility data for the entire national territory.

name: BUPi - Balcão Único do Prédio (Cadastral Portal)
operator: Direção-Geral do Território (DGT) / BUPi
dataType: Cadastral parcels, property boundaries, SNIC integration, administrative boundaries
description: Portugal's Single Property Window integrating cadastral data from DGT, tax authority and land registry into the National Cadastral Information System (SNIC), covering 127 municipalities with geometric property identification.

name: COS - Carta de Uso e Ocupação do Solo (Land Cover Map)
operator: Direção-Geral do Território (DGT)
dataType: Land use/land cover classification (83 classes), change detection layers
description: Portugal's national land use and land cover map series (COS) with 83-class hierarchical nomenclature at 1 ha resolution, produced by DGT under the SMOS monitoring system with editions from 1995 to 2023.

name: LNEG Geothermal Resources Catalogue
operator: Laboratório Nacional de Energia e Geologia (LNEG)
dataType: Geothermal occurrences, thermal springs, subsurface temperatures, geothermal potential zones
description: Catalogue of geothermal resources in mainland Portugal maintained by LNEG, mapping thermal springs, subsurface temperature data and geothermal potential zones to support renewable energy exploration.

name: OPEKEPE - Agricultural Payments and LPIS
operator: Payment and Control Agency for Guidance and Guarantee Community Aid Schemes (OPEKEPE)
dataType: Agricultural parcel reference data, CAP subsidy parcels, land use declarations, orthoimagery
description: Greece's CAP paying agency managing the national LPIS with georeferenced agricultural parcel boundaries, declared crop types and eligibility data used for area-based subsidy verification.

name: POSEIDON System - Marine Monitoring and Forecasting
operator: Hellenic Centre for Marine Research (HCMR)
dataType: Sea temperature, salinity, currents, wave height, ocean colour, atmospheric parameters, ecological indicators
description: Comprehensive marine monitoring and forecasting system for the Hellenic Seas operated by HCMR, combining fixed buoy stations, gliders, Argo floats and numerical models to provide real-time oceanographic and atmospheric data.

name: NOA EIDA - Seismological Waveform Data Archive
operator: Institute of Geodynamics, National Observatory of Athens (NOA)
dataType: Seismic waveforms, station metadata, earthquake catalogues, moment tensors
description: European Integrated Data Archive (EIDA) node at NOA providing open access to seismic waveform data from the Hellenic Unified Seismic Network (HUSN) covering Greece and the southeastern Mediterranean.

name: ITSAK Strong Motion Network and ShakeMaps
operator: Institute of Engineering Seismology and Earthquake Engineering (ITSAK/EPPO)
dataType: Accelerograms, strong-motion records, ShakeMaps, seismic hazard parameters
description: ITSAK operates Greece's national accelerometric network of 200+ stations providing strong-motion records, the GHEAD interactive database of 1097 waveforms, and real-time ShakeMaps for earthquake engineering applications.

name: YPEN Geoportal - Ministry of Environment and Energy
operator: Ministry of Environment and Energy (YPEN)
dataType: Natura 2000, protected areas, flood hazard zones, bathing water quality, air quality, species distribution, land use
description: Greek Ministry of Environment and Energy geoportal providing INSPIRE-compliant spatial data on Natura 2000 sites, flood hazard areas, bathing water quality, air quality monitoring, species distribution and environmental impact assessments.

name: ELSTAT Census and Statistical Geography
operator: Hellenic Statistical Authority (ELSTAT)
dataType: Census tract boundaries, population statistics by area, historical census diagrams, land use by prefecture
description: ELSTAT's geographic statistical data including interactive census maps, historical population diagrams from 1958, and statistical boundary datasets published on geodata.gov.gr for demographic, agricultural and socioeconomic analysis.

name: LifeWatch Greece - Biodiversity Data Infrastructure
operator: Hellenic Centre for Marine Research (HCMR) / LifeWatch ERIC
dataType: Species occurrence records, ecological data, marine biodiversity (MedOBIS), Greek taxonomic checklists
description: Greece's LifeWatch node coordinated by HCMR providing access to biodiversity data through virtual labs and e-services, integrating species occurrence records from 49 partner institutions and the MedOBIS Mediterranean marine database.

name: BEYOND Centre of EO Excellence - NOA
operator: Institute for Astronomy, Astrophysics, Space Applications and Remote Sensing (IAASARS), National Observatory of Athens
dataType: Active fire detection, burnt scar mapping, DInSAR ground deformation, Sentinel products
description: NOA's BEYOND centre providing 24/7 near-real-time fire detection (FireHub), DInSAR ground deformation (GeoHub) and Sentinel satellite products for natural disaster monitoring across SE Europe, N Africa and the Middle East.

name: Water Development Department Geoportal
operator: Water Development Department (WDD), Ministry of Agriculture
dataType: Dam levels, groundwater monitoring, water supply networks, river basins, irrigation zones, borehole data
description: ArcGIS-based geoportal of Cyprus Water Development Department providing spatial data on dams, groundwater wells, water supply infrastructure, river basins and irrigation networks supporting integrated water resource management.

name: Cyprus Department of Environment - Nature and Natura 2000 Data
operator: Department of Environment, Ministry of Agriculture, Rural Development and Environment
dataType: Natura 2000 sites (SPA/SCI/SAC), species inventories, environmental impact assessments, air quality, waste
description: Cyprus Department of Environment providing Natura 2000 site boundaries and attribute data, species inventories, environmental impact assessment data and biodiversity strategy information through data.gov.cy.

name: Cyprus Department of Forests - Forest and Fire Data
operator: Department of Forests, Ministry of Agriculture, Rural Development and Environment
dataType: State forest boundaries, fire history, reforestation areas, forest recreation zones, forest inventory
formats: Shapefile, PDF maps (via data.gov.cy and DLS geoportal)
description: Geospatial data from the Cyprus Department of Forests covering 157,788 ha of state forests including forest boundaries, fire perimeters, reforestation zones and recreation areas, distributed via data.gov.cy and the DLS geoportal.

name: Cyprus Air Quality Monitoring Network
operator: Department of Labour Inspection, Ministry of Labour and Social Insurance
dataType: NO2, O3, SO2, CO, PM10, PM2.5 concentrations from monitoring stations
description: Real-time air quality monitoring network of 9 stations across Cyprus (traffic, residential, industrial and background sites) measuring NO2, O3, SO2, CO, PM10 and PM2.5 with live data display and historical downloads.

name: CERA - Cyprus Energy Regulatory Authority Open Data
operator: Cyprus Energy Regulatory Authority (CERA/RAEK)
dataType: Energy licenses, renewable energy installations, electricity generation, natural gas infrastructure
description: Cyprus Energy Regulatory Authority providing open datasets on energy licenses, renewable energy installations, electricity generation statistics and natural gas infrastructure through the national open data portal.

name: CYSTAT - Statistical Service Census and Geographic Data
operator: Statistical Service of Cyprus (CYSTAT), Ministry of Finance
dataType: Population census data, demographic statistics, building census, agricultural census, district-level statistics
description: Cyprus Statistical Service providing population, housing and building census results with geographic breakdowns by district and municipality, along with agricultural statistics and demographic indicators.

name: Cyprus Department of Town Planning and Housing - Spatial Planning Data
operator: Department of Town Planning and Housing, Ministry of Interior
dataType: Planning zones, development plans, land use zoning, building regulations, urban boundaries
formats: Shapefile, PDF, web viewer (via DLS geoportal)
description: Spatial planning datasets from the Cyprus Department of Town Planning and Housing including zoning maps, local development plans, permitted land uses and urban planning boundaries accessible through the national open data portal and DLS geoportal.
